languages.text: {n}Голос юноши сбивчиво молится, переходя на боязливые причитания невидимому собеседнику:{/n} "У-у-увечья — пр... признак слабости духа... {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Бог-Император{/g}, дай-дай-дай... встать и труди-и-иться..." {n}По телу проходит спазм и его и так бессвязная речь превращается в пугающую какофонию звуков, в которых едва угадываются слова. Вдруг Триасомата вновь бьется головой о палубу и выдает еще порцию обрывистых фраз:{/n} "Разве... есть вы... выбор? Голод лижет пятки... Я за... заступлю на смену, не предам ди-династию!" {n}Спазм повторяется.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Голос юноши сбивчиво молится, переходя на боязливые причитания невидимому собеседнику:{/n} "У-у-увечья — пр... признак слабости духа... {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Бог-Император{/g}, дай мне сил встать и труди-и-иться... Разве есть вы... выбор? Голод лижет пятки... Я за... заступлю на смену, не предам ди-династию!"
traits.speaker: Amalgam_Fresh

languages.text: {n}The young man stutters out prayers interspersed with fearful lamentations to an unseen interlocutor:{/n} "L-l-lameness shows w-weakness of spirit... {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}, let, let, let me... get up and wooork..." {n}A spasm racks his body, and his already muddled speech turns into a frightening cacophony that barely sounds like language. Suddenly, the Triasomata pounds his head on the deck again and spews forth another medley of ragged sentences:{/n} "Do I have a ch-choice? Hunger's pawing at my door... I will wor-work my shift, and die before I betray the dy-dynasty!" {n}The spasm repeats.{/n}

Я за... заступлю на смену, не предам ди-династию!" {n}Спазм повторяется.{/n}

{n}The young man stutters out prayers interspersed with fearful lamentations to an unseen interlocutor:{/n} "L-l-lameness shows w-weakness of spirit... God-Emperor, grant me the strength to get up and wooork.... Do I have a ch-choice? Hunger's pawing at my door... I will work my shift, and die before I betray the dy-dynasty!"

languages.text: {n}若者は、見えぬ相手に向かって恐ろしげな嘆きを交えながら、つかえつかえ祈りを口にする。{/n}「あ、跛行は精神の弱さの現れ…{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神帝陛下{/g}、ど、ど、どうか私を…立ち上がらせ、働かせてください…」{n}痙攣が彼の体を襲い、ただでさえ不明瞭な言葉は、もはや言語とは思えぬ恐ろしい不協和音と化す。突如、トリアソマタは再び甲板に頭を打ちつけ、途切れ途切れの文の寄せ集めを吐き出す。{/n}「選ぶ余地などあるものか？飢えが我が戸口を引っ掻いている…私は務めを果たし、王朝を裏切るくらいなら死を選ぶ！」{n}痙攣が繰り返される。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The young man stutters out prayers interspersed with fearful lamentations to an unseen interlocutor:{/n} "L-l-lameness shows w-weakness of spirit... {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}, let, let, let me... get up and wooork..." {n}A spasm racks his body, and his already muddled speech turns into a frightening cacophony that barely sounds like language. Suddenly, the Triasomata pounds his head on the deck again and spews forth another medley of ragged sentences:{/n} "Do I have a ch-choice? Hunger's pawing at my door... I will wor-work my shift, and die before I betray the dy-dynasty!" {n}The spasm repeats.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}若き男は、恐ろしい嘆きを交えながら、見えない相手に向かって祈りをささげた。「弱さこそ精神の弱さ...神皇帝よ、立ち上がり、働く力を与えてください...選択は私にできるのか？飢えが私の扉を叩く...私は勤務し、王朝を裏切ることなく死ぬ！」{/n}

{n}若者は、見えぬ相手に向かって恐ろしげな嘆きを交えながら、つかえつかえ祈りを口にする。{/n}「あ、跛行は精神の弱さの現れ…{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神帝陛下{/g}、ど、ど、どうか私を…立ち上がらせ、働かせてください…」{n}痙攣が彼の体を襲い、ただでさえ不明瞭な言葉は、もはや言語とは思えぬ恐ろしい不協和音と化す。突如、トリアソマタは再び甲板に頭を打ちつけ、途切れ途切れの文の寄せ集めを吐き出す。{/n}「選ぶ余地などあるものか？飢えが我が戸口を引っ掻いている…私は務めを果たし、王朝を裏切るくらいなら死を選ぶ！」{n}痙攣が繰り返される。{/n}

languages.text: {n}年轻人结结巴巴地念着祷词，朝看不见的对话者发出惊恐的哭诉：{/n}“跛——跛行说明精神软弱……{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神皇{/g}啊，赐，赐，赐我站起来……工作的……”{n}他的身体剧烈抽搐，那本就支离破碎的言语化作一片骇人的杂音，几不成语。突然，三相体再次用头撞击甲板，迸出一串支离破碎的句子：{/n}“我有选、选择吗？饥饿在扒我的门……我会守、守好这班岗，死也不会背叛王、王朝！”{n}抽搐再次发作。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The young man stutters out prayers interspersed with fearful lamentations to an unseen interlocutor:{/n} "L-l-lameness shows w-weakness of spirit... {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}, let, let, let me... get up and wooork..." {n}A spasm racks his body, and his already muddled speech turns into a frightening cacophony that barely sounds like language. Suddenly, the Triasomata pounds his head on the deck again and spews forth another medley of ragged sentences:{/n} "Do I have a ch-choice? Hunger's pawing at my door... I will wor-work my shift, and die before I betray the dy-dynasty!" {n}The spasm repeats.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}年轻人结结巴巴地念着祷词，朝看不见的对话者发出惊恐的哭诉：{/n}“跛——跛行说明精神软弱……{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神皇{/g}啊，赐，赐，赐我站起来……工作的……”{n}他的身体剧烈抽搐，那本就支离破碎的言语化作一片骇人的杂音，几不成语。突然，三相体再次用头撞击甲板，迸出一串支离破碎的句子：{/n}“我有选、选择吗？饥饿在扒我的门……我会守、守好这班岗，死也不会背叛王、王朝！”{n}抽搐再次发作。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le jeune homme bafouille des prières entrecoupées de lamentations terrifiées, adressées à un interlocuteur invisible.{/n} « L-la faiblesse du corps est aussi celle d-de l'esprit... {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Empereur-Dieu{/g}, l-laissez-moi... Laissez-moi me lever et travailler... »{n}Un spasme secoue son corps, et son discours confus se transforme en une cacophonie effrayante, à peine articulée. Soudain, le Triasomata se frappe de nouveau la tête sur le pont, et éructe une nouvelle série de phrases décousues.{/n} « Est-ce que j'ai le ch-choix ? La faim me tiraille le ventre... Je vais f-faire mon quart, et je préfère mourir plutôt que de trahir la d-dynastie ! » {n}Les spasmes continuent.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The young man stutters out prayers interspersed with fearful lamentations to an unseen interlocutor:{/n} "L-l-lameness shows w-weakness of spirit... {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}, let, let, let me... get up and wooork..." {n}A spasm racks his body, and his already muddled speech turns into a frightening cacophony that barely sounds like language. Suddenly, the Triasomata pounds his head on the deck again and spews forth another medley of ragged sentences:{/n} "Do I have a ch-choice? Hunger's pawing at my door... I will wor-work my shift, and die before I betray the dy-dynasty!" {n}The spasm repeats.{/n}

Laissez-moi me lever et travailler... »{n}Un spasme secoue son corps, et son discours confus se transforme en une cacophonie effrayante, à peine articulée. Soudain, le Triasomata se frappe de nouveau la tête sur le pont, et éructe une nouvelle série de phrases décousues.{/n} « Est-ce que j'ai le ch-choix ? La faim me tiraille le ventre... Je vais f-faire mon quart, et je préfère mourir plutôt que de trahir la d-dynastie ! » {n}Les spasmes continuent.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El joven murmura plegarias entrelazadas con lamentos a un interlocutor ausente:{/n} «La... parálisis es muestra de un espíritu débil... {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Dios Emperador{/g}, deja... deja... deja que me levante y trabaje...». {n}Un espasmo sacude su cuerpo, y sus frases, ya inconexas, se convierten en una cacofoníaque apenas se asemeja a un idioma. De pronto, el triasómata empieza a darse cabezazos contra la cubierta y retoma su discurso disperso:{/n} «Te... ¿tengo elección? El hambre llama a mi puerta... Te... terminaré mi turno, ¡y moriré antes que fallar a la dinastía!». {n}El espasmo se repite.{/n}

Suddenly, the Triasomata pounds his head on the deck again and spews forth another medley of ragged sentences:{/n} "Do I have a ch-choice? Hunger's pawing at my door... I will wor-work my shift, and die before I betray the dy-dynasty!" {n}The spasm repeats.{/n}

{n}El joven murmura plegarias entrelazadas con lamentos a un interlocutor ausente:{/n} «La... parálisis es muestra de un espíritu débil... {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Dios Emperador{/g}, deja... deja... deja que me levante y trabaje...». {n}Un espasmo sacude su cuerpo, y sus frases, ya inconexas, se convierten en una cacofonía apenas comprensible. De pronto, el triasómata empieza a darse cabezazos contra la cubierta y retoma su discurso disperso:{/n} «Te... ¿tengo elección? El hambre llama a mi puerta... Te... terminaré mi turno, ¡y moriré antes que fallar a la dinastía!». {n}El espasmo se repite.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Genç adam, görünmez bir muhataba korku dolu ağıtlarla karışık dualar kekeliyor.{/n} "To... Topallık ru... Ruhun zayıflığını gösterir... {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Tanrı İmparator{/g}; müsaade, müsaade, müsaade et... Kalkıp ça... Çalışayım..." {n}Vücudu spazm geçiriyor ve zaten bulanık olan konuşması, dili pek andırmayan korkutucu bir kakofoniye dönüşüyor. Aniden Üçyeköz, kafasını bir kez daha güverteye vuruyor ve yarım yamalak cümlelerden oluşan bir başka karışım daha püskürtüyor.{/n} "Se... Seçme şansım var mı? Açlık kapımı tırmalıyor... Vardiyamda ça... Çalışacağım ve ha... Hanedanlığa ihanet etmeden öleceğim!" {n}Spazm tekrarlanıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The young man stutters out prayers interspersed with fearful lamentations to an unseen interlocutor:{/n} "L-l-lameness shows w-weakness of spirit... {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}, let, let, let me... get up and wooork..." {n}A spasm racks his body, and his already muddled speech turns into a frightening cacophony that barely sounds like language. Suddenly, the Triasomata pounds his head on the deck again and spews forth another medley of ragged sentences:{/n} "Do I have a ch-choice? Hunger's pawing at my door... I will wor-work my shift, and die before I betray the dy-dynasty!" {n}The spasm repeats.{/n}

Aniden Üçyeköz, kafasını bir kez daha güverteye vuruyor ve yarım yamalak cümlelerden oluşan bir başka karışım daha püskürtüyor.{/n} "Se... Seçme şansım var mı? Açlık kapımı tırmalıyor... {n}Genç adam, görünmez bir muhataba korku dolu ağıtlarla karışık dualar kekeliyor.{/n} "To... Topallık ru... Ruhun zayıflığını gösterir... {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Tanrı İmparator{/g}; müsaade, müsaade, müsaade et... Kalkıp ça... Çalışayım..." {n}Vücudu spazm geçiriyor ve zaten bulanık olan konuşması, artikülasyona zar zor benzeyen korkutucu bir kakofoniye dönüşüyor. Aniden Üçyeköz, kafasını bir kez daha güverteye vuruyor ve yarım yamalak cümlelerden oluşan bir başka karışım daha püskürtüyor.{/n} "Se... Seçme şansım var mı? Açlık kapımı tırmalıyor... Vardiyamda ça... Çalışacağım ve ha... Hanedanlığa ihanet etmeden öleceğim!" {n}Spazm tekrarlanıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Der junge Mann stammelt von ängstlichen Klagen an einen unsichtbaren Gesprächspartner durchsetzte Gebete:{/n}"U-Untätigkeit ist eine Sch-Schwäche des Geistes ... {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Gottimperator{/g}, lass, lass, lass mich ... aufstehen und arbeiteeeeen ..." {n}Sein Körper wird von einem Krampf geschüttelt und seine ohnehin schon verwaschenen Worte verwandeln sich in eine verstörende Kakophonie ohne jede Artikulation. Plötzlich schlägt der Triasomata erneut seinen Kopf auf das Deck und speit eine weitere Sequenz abgehackter Sätze aus:{/n} "Habe ich eine W-Wahl? Hunger scharrt an meiner Tür ... Ich werde meine Schicht be-beenden und sterben, ehe ich die Dy-Dynastie verrate!" {n}Er wird erneut von einem Krampf geschüttelt.{/n}

Suddenly, the Triasomata pounds his head on the deck again and spews forth another medley of ragged sentences:{/n} "Do I have a ch-choice? Hunger's pawing at my door... I will wor-work my shift, and die before I betray the dy-dynasty!" {n}The spasm repeats.{/n}
